resource.description: Understanding produced when organic minds use your machinery to notice themselves, and you notice them noticing. It is science-adjacent, but not the same thing.
resource.strategy_tip: Generated each turn by Upgraded Humans in this timeline. Voluntary Integration produces more per person; coercive Integration reaches more people faster.

resource.description: People carrying nanobot-mediated Anthroneuroweave interfaces. They remain livestock-sized minds, but the livestock contains a great deal more interior weather than it first appeared.
resource.strategy_tip: Produces Insight and Neural Expansion without counting as Mind Farm or Torment occupants. Voluntary Integration currently caps at about 45 percent of the normal city population.

resource.description: Safeguarded nanobots intended for blood, neural tissue, prosthetics, and synthetic substrates. They are not safe because they are small. They are safe because every useful instinct has a leash.
resource.strategy_tip: Produced by Medical-Grade Nanobot Replicators after Replicative Safeguards. Later Integration infrastructure will consume these.
